steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence says nobody can ever ______ these women "as the first" to accomplish these feats. The blank needs a word meaning to replace or displace someone from a position they already hold.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — stipulate: means to demand or specify as a condition. Has nothing to do with displacing someone from a position. ✗
  • Choice B — induce: means to persuade or bring about. Does not convey replacing or overtaking someone. ✗
  • Choice C — supplant: means to take the place of someone, especially by force or strategy. Fits exactly — nobody can displace these women as the first to accomplish these feats. ✓
  • Choice D — engender: means to cause or give rise to something. Has no sense of displacement. ✗
That matches Choice C — supplant.
